data_description.name: This name will be prefixed to all sensors (change as you like)
data_description.sn: Device Serial Number (retrieve from the web interface)
data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of the device to connect to
data_description.port: The TCP port (8899) of the device to connect to
data_description.lookup_file: The yaml file containing inverter parameter definitions
